programme.desc: Ambitious agent Kim faces sexism from veteran Andrew while trying to sell a mansion to rescue her sister from their abusive Aunt Erika. Influencer Alexa outbids Erika, helping Kim win legal custody.

programme.desc: Gamer Archie wins a Ford competition to become a real racer. After using his skills to save his dad from gangsters, he earns a $100,000 contract, proving gaming can pay the bills and clear family debt.

programme.title: In-Laws Can't Stop Fighting At Kid's Birthday Party
programme.desc: During a family trip for their grandson's 5th birthday, rival grandmothers Ida and Geraldine engage in a series of petty battles, culminating in a cake fight. After seeing their grandson Jackson's distress, they finally reconcile and bake a "blended" cake together.

programme.title: Streamer Is Caught Cheating
programme.desc: Mikey scams viewers by having his brother, Jayden, play Minecraft on his stream, taking all the credit and money. His deception unravels at a fan event when he can't play himself, exposing his fraud. Jayden then gains recognition, leaving Mikey to face the consequences.

programme.title: Employee Fakes Sick To Skip Work
programme.desc: Jacob, a compulsive liar, fakes his grandma's death to skip work for a date with his boss's daughter, Nicole. His web of lies unravels when both grandmas appear, exposing his deceit and costing him his job, his girlfriend, and his dignity.

programme.title: Caught Cheating On Drivers Test
programme.desc: Tim, a spoiled teen, cheats on his driving test using his dad's Tesla, but his schemes unravel. After hitting a car and failing, he's arrested, and his furious dad refuses bail, leaving Tim to face the consequences alone.

programme.title: Kid Chooses Treasure Over Friends
programme.desc: Three friends embark on a treasure hunt, hoping to solve their money problems. They face challenges and temptations, ultimately realizing that true wealth lies not in riches but in the bond of their friendship.

programme.title: Dad Dresses As Nanny To See Kids
programme.desc: After being kicked out for his dedication to acting, Alex disguises himself as a nanny to be near his kids. He must then contend with his wife's new boyfriend and the challenges of being a nanny. When his cover is blown, he must decide between his career and his family.

programme.title: Teen Caught Cheating By Live Audience
programme.desc: Aspiring gamer Jordan resorts to cheating, using aimbots to win a Call of Duty tournament and impress his crush. His deceit unravels during the finals when his cheat fails, exposing his lies and leading to public humiliation.

programme.title: Adult Wants To Stay Adult Forever
programme.desc: Child actor Brent, unwilling to age out of his famous role, faces rejection in Hollywood. Broke and desperate, he takes a diner job, where a chance encounter with his childhood idol inspires him to embrace maturity and pursue new acting dreams.

programme.title: Birthday Party Changes Girl's Life Forever

programme.title: Kim's Rude Awakenings

programme.title: Kim's Rude Awakenings

programme.title: My Teenage Wedding

programme.title: My Teenage Wedding
programme.desc: S1:E14 Hashtag Gay Wedding - David and Tre'Darrius, both 19, are young, black, and gay, and getting married in not-so-progressive Memphis. But before making it legal in Washington, DC, Tre must first get over his fear of flying!

programme.title: My Teenage Wedding
programme.desc: S1:E15 Off 2 Get Hitched - Her mom says Leah, 18, needs a reality check, and his best man thinks Codey, 19, is making a bad mistake. programme.title: My Teenage Wedding

programme.desc: In this episode of Snack Wars, Korean band ENHYPEN try snacks from the UK and Korea! The boys are surprisingly BIG fans of Malteasers, get stuck into classic British Jaffa Cakes, and are split when it comes down to a Dairylea Lunchable! West Ham players Tomáš Souček, James Ward-Prowse and Niclas Füllkrug are the latest Premier League footballers to tackle a game of Snack Wars, tasting and rating food from the UK and wider world, including treats from Italy, Nigeria and Australia.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay, Paul Ainsworth and Nyesha Arrington film a special 'Chef's Edition' of Snack Wars: England Vs USA. Gordon Ramsay throws a Pop-Tart, he judges beans on toast and they all have incredible reactions to Toxic Waste!

programme.title: Do You Even Know Me?: Episode 13
programme.desc: Ana de Armas and Norman Reedus put their friendship to the test in the ultimate guessing game – and let's just say, Norman might need a few more revision sessions... We put Idris Elba and John Cena in the hot seat to test their friendship! In this episode, the Heads of State stars try to prove who knows the other best... From Idris' hilariously cheeky original DJ name to the movie John can't let him live down.

programme.title: The Goat
programme.desc: Harry Pinero, Rory Jennings, and Tom Garratt pick the best signing of the Premier League Season so far. Jack Grealish, Eberechi Eze, Bryan Mbeumo, Alexander Isak, Florian Wirtz and more are all in the conversation of the best signing.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: In this episode, Man City fan Big Steve goes up against the don of AFTV, Robbie Lyle. Will Man City ever be as big as Arsenal? Would any Arsenal players make it into Man City's team? Did Man City buy their success?

programme.title: AGREE TO DISAGREE
programme.desc: Ahead of Tottenham Hotspur against Liverpool, ‪Expressions‬ tells Laurence McKenna why he thinks Mo Salah is overrated and why he thinks Arne Slot will be sacked before Thomas Frank. The two argue over some of the biggest debates between the teams.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we sit down with former London gangster Bobby Cummines to find out about his life of crime, what he called his shotgun and the one killing that still haunts him...

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Jon Atack, a former Scientology member turned authoritarian cult expert and author, provides invaluable insights from his personal experiences, shedding light on the hierarchy, leadership, celebrity involvement, and origin story of the organisation.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: SAS soldier 'Big Phil' Campion talks us through the notorious selection process for the SAS, his time serving on the private circuit in Iraq and Afghanistan, and his stint fighting pirates off the coast of Somalia.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: This week we talked to Francis Ngannou, Cameroonian mixed martial artist, the world's hardest hitter and the current UFC Heavyweight Champion of the world. Francis told us his incredible life story and if he's gonna have a fight with Tyson Fury.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode, we spoke to intrepid explorer Benedict Allen who has nearly died nine times throughout his career - including when he was threatened by gold miners, contracted deadly malaria and was shot at by Pablo Escobar's hitmen. Benedict relives his experience of becoming the first person to cross the Amazon Basin and getting lost alone in the rainforest for weeks without food, shelter or water. This desperate situation led him to make one of the toughest decisions of his life and moulded him into the explorer we meet today.

programme.title: Minutes With

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters: Zambezi Expeditions Camp Part 1
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Mana Pools to experience the untamed wilderness in the extreme dry season. Her guide, Cloud, takes her on an expedition to find lion cubs and wild dog puppies. Will they find what they are looking for?

programme.title: The Power of Plants The Great Escape
programme.desc: You think plants are boring or passive? Far from it! They use complex reactions to respond to light, sound and touch. And like in the animal kingdom, different species have developed a near unending list of strategies to ensure their legacy is passed on. Plants have evolved tricks to beat the ele-ments, animal enemies or even other plants: From thorns and spines to poisons and even live-in bodyguards. This two-part series shows the survival strategies of our green “roommates” we share the planet with.

programme.title: Hunters of the Forest
programme.desc: Forests are dark, shady habitats, realms of shadows perfect for predators to lurk. The dense plant growth facilitates a wealth of prey species, and cunning predators of all shapes and sizes have adapted to exploit every niche. Whether crawling on the forest floor, gliding through the trees or stalking the shadows in between, hunters have mastered the terrain in every type of forest imagina-ble. And they're not just stealthy, they're also some of the most enigmatic and beautiful creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: This popular motif in prehistoric cave paintings, the European Bison is Europe's heaviest land mammal. Weighing in at just under one tonne, it is also Europe's last wild cattle spieces

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: With antlers that can grow up to 2 meters in size and can consume 10kg of grass, young trees and bark a day the Elk is the largest deep spieces in the world. With their habitat the dense, poorly accessible forests and moorlands, we see the coumminities of Elk driven up by climate change.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: A robber and loner who loves to hunt at night, the Lynx is Europe's largest wildcat. With the vast mounhtainous forests to call home, where they can hear a mouse from 50 meters away, there is plenty of cover for hunting possibilities.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: The Wolverin is a heavy weight and loner of the vast, coniferous forests, moors and mountains. Resemblying a bear rather than a marten in physique, it can grow up to 1 meter in length and can bring down a young moose with his teeth.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Dr. Greg sets up a darting competition – the winner gets to dart a zebra on an upcoming case. Delarey, the hunter, is shocked when Roxanne, hits a bulls eye! Can he do the same?

programme.title: Wilderness in Europe: The Bohemian Forest
programme.desc: The Bohemian Forest is the source of the Vltava River, home to primeval forests, untouched high moors and bubbling torrents. This archaic stretch of land, which includes the Bavarian Forest, was long considered impenetrable and mysterious. Since the fall of the Iron Curtain, Bavarian border residents have rediscovered new references to this unusual forest landscape for themselves. This is also the case with photo artist Bastian Kalous, who has been documenting his homeland for years with nostalgic-looking Polaroid photographs and is dealing with its eventful history for an illustrated book. Or Elisa Belotti and Marco Heurich, who have dedicated their lives to the lynxes. In order for Europe's largest wild cat to survive in the Bohemian Forest, the lynx researchers fight for every single animal. Iryna Rudenko came to Zwiesel from Ukraine out of a passion for glass as a material to study at the glass school. After graduation, she would like to stay in Bavaria, Anna Hones grew up in Horská Kvilda, the smallest and highest village in the Czech Republic. The village lies just under 1100 meters above sea level, directly on the former border. The farmer, who experienced communism, the fall of the Iron Curtain and the subsequent changes, is now trying to find ways of surviving in this barren region with her children.

programme.title: Wilderness in Europe: The Bohemian Forest
programme.desc: Pavel Hubeny, whose life would be unthinkable without the forest, is the head of the Šumava National Park. He is committed to ensuring that a primeval forest can grow for future generations, in which man does not interfere. This vision of a primeval forest is also shared by the forester Claus Bässler, who wants to counteract the extinction of species by having trees felled to create artificial deadwood and thus a new habitat for rare beetles and fungi. On the Vltava River lies the small town of Krumlov, the "Pearl of the Bohemian Forest" with its Baroque theater and fully preserved stage technology from the 17th century. Here the director Zuzana Vrbová enchants people from all over the world with her productions. Apart from agriculture, it was mainly the abundance of forests that ensured the livelihood of the inhabitants of the Bohemian Forest - including that of the carpenter Philipp von Manz, who processed local wood for his customers all over Germany. Veterinarian Judith Gollner, who grew up in the Austrian part of the Bohemian Forest, lived in Vienna for a long time and made a conscious decision to return. She likes the people and is proud of "her farmers' wives" who share her love of the Bohemian Forest.

programme.title: Spectacular wildlife in the forests around the globe
programme.desc: A forest is like an organism, ancient and full of complex mechanics at work. Its plants need water and a specific range of temperature. And still, it can be found in the most variable places of the world. But how does it manage to adapt to the most adverse condition and still thrive? “Forests of this earth” uncovers the forest's amazing strategies of survival, the strange phenomena that allow them to strive in varied biotopes and under different environmental conditions, and the interplay they have with the fascinating animals living in them.

programme.title: Northern Woods
programme.desc: It is a musical film a a tributeto the Nordic forest: it shows its development from a primeval wood to a cultivated forest. Once populated by wild animals such as wolves, bears, eagles, deer and musk oxen, complex re-enactment-scenes shot by dollies and helicopters vividly depict the colonization of the forest by the Celts and Germans. But as time progressed, the northern forest has on numerous occasions fallen victim to environmental degradation and overexploitation. Several provisions were made to protect this wild beauty. The Helsinki resolution of 1993, which stipulated that the woods be used in a way and in a magnitude which guarantees their biological variety and productiveness and vitality, is but one measure put in place to secure the preservation of the natural gem. Time-lapse photography and breath-taking shots show our main protagonist – the woods – in its stunning glory. This beautiful wooded land, changes throughout the seasons. Our woodland is a world-renowned ecological jewel. It is famous, well-known and loved by tourists, forest economists, environmentalists, historians and intellectuals alike.

programme.title: Germany's Mystic Forest
programme.desc: 2.000 rivers and streams dig deep into the underground and transport their water into reservoirs or "Germany's Wild Amazon", the Wupper. These forests and rivers, together with heathlands and moors, are home to a diverse fauna. Martens, badgers, wild boars, hares, roe deer, and red deer, even black grouse and hazel deer find shelter in these parts. Wolves also have a dominant presence, not to mention those who live underground, such as lizards, bats, and snakes. Accompany us on a journey where we explore every corner of this rugged land. Climb underground into the Bergisches Land, through the vast hidden cave systems that sprawl far beneath the forests. There is also much to be discovered in the water, dive with us in crystal clear streams and rivers with their diverse flora and fauna.

programme.title: Darkwoods
programme.desc: Half a century ago the German Duke Carl von Württemberg purchased a 55.000-hectare parcel of land in the Selkirk Mountains in British Columbia, Canada. He baptized his holdings after his native Black Forest, "Darkwoods", and managed the forests in the lonely region sustainably.

programme.title: Stories of the Mediterranean Forest: Sierra Morena
programme.desc: The Mediterranean Basin is one of the planet's most biologically rich and complex regions. The crossroads of Europe, Asia and Africa is considered to be one of Earth's biodiversity hotspots. A vast number of both animal and plant species unique to the region live in its various habitats. The Mediterranean Basin is located in one of the planet's temperate zones. The subtropical climate makes it colder and wet here in winter, hot and dry in summer and mild and rainy in autumn and spring.

programme.title: Bavarian Forest
programme.desc: After an unusual mass reproduction of bark beetles in the nineties, thousands hectares of old spruce forest were destroyed. Soon after, a new, healthier forest started to grow – a new primeval forest. Within a few years, in place of the former monoculture, a diverse forest developed, rich in spruces, ashes, beech and fir trees. Naturally, this diversity has in turn attracted new animal and plant species. Even lynx and otters returned and made Bavaria their home again.

programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom - and it looks like this is going to be a bumper crop! Strawberry decides to celebrate the event with a first-ever Berry Big Berry Blossom Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While working in her store, Orange overhears the Berrykins laughing and shouting outside. When she goes to the door to investigate, a clump of dandelion fluff gets blown inside chased by three Berrykins. She watches as they head butt the clump around until it floats back toward Orange. Just as it floats close, she gives it a bat sending it outside and the Berrykins happily chasing after it. Wanting in on the fun, she joins them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. He's been waiting for her so that they can get started making treats and decorating for Sadiebug's and Kadiebug's party that afternoon. But Custard and Pupcake have enjoyed their time outside so much that they want to continue playing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When a mole's tunnel collapses Jon's yard, affecting Garfield's friends, the strays, and squirrels, Garfield comes up with a master plan that just might solve everyone's problems.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon is birdsitting his editor's parrot, Paxton, while Odie is away. But soon Paxton's doom and gloom attitude is bringing everyone down. Not even Garfield can help him but maybe someone else can...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's something very strange going on with the weather in town when it starts to rain sandwiches after a massive heatwave.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon, Odie, Garfield, and the twin follow what seems to be the source of the bizarre weather: a single cloud. It leads them to something and someone they could never have imagined.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There is a space invasion under Jon Arbuckle's roof, and the aliens are looking very much like Garfield's favourite meal: lasagnas.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Squeak and his mice family have taken up residence in Garfield's house, to Jon's despair, who will deprive Garfield of lasagnas if he doesn't turn things back to normal.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's favourite restaurant, Vito's Pizzeria, is in jeopardy. The evil Mama Meany wants to buy it to expand his own restaurant, with the PizzaGrand 7000 capable of making ten pizzas a minute.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A mother bluebird is locked in a neighbourhood garage, so who will care for her eggs? That's a job for Garfield, who is sometimes quite a mother hen.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie is found by Al the Dogcatcher with no license on his collar so he puts him in the city pound with other stray dogs. Garfield will do everything to get his friend back.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie falls in love with a brush. Garfield becomes a little bit jealous about that and decides to make the brush disappear.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon finds an old accordion. It's unbearable for Garfield who totally dislikes this music. He will do everything to get rid of it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon has won a live turkey in a raffle and wants to prepare it for dinner, but he can't make up his mind to eat it. Neither can Garfield!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie are watching a horror movie... They're scared. Jon, who has forgotten his key, is knocking at the door. The two pets won't let him in until he's proven his identity.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie are watching a horror movie... They're scared. Jon, who has forgotten his key, is knocking at the door. The two pets won't let him in until he's proven his identity.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is angry. A fake, secret agent is trying to steal the show and his popularity among his friends.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Garfield goes trick or treating and disguises himself as a scary Catzilla. But the real Catzilla has just escaped from the city zoo and will spread panic in Garfield's neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie has been thrown out of the house by Garfield and spends all night outside on his own. An alien crashes his UFO in the garden and loses a key part necessary to get back home!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal's owner has gone away on vacation and Jon has offered to look after Nermal while he's gone. Watch out, everybody! The cutest kitten in the world (he says so himself) is coming over for a week!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Who has stolen Pooky? After a night drying on the clothes line, Pooky has disappeared, and Garfield can't sleep without him.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's night-time and the full moon and the alignment of the planets are having a strange effect on Odie.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz's parents are coming over to meet Jon and Jon really has to make a good impression.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon goes to visit his brother, Doc Boy, who lives on a livestock farm. It's out in the country, and since Garfield is a real city cat, it's no picnic for him!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There is a Pet Show in town, and the winner will get a huge lasagna from Vito's restaurant. That's worth trying for Garfield. But Nermal is in the competition too...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's a new TV Show called "Instant Petmatching", which is about seeing if pets are matching with their owner. The result of the test is that Jon and Garfield are incompatible!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie finds the pot of gold at the bottom of a rainbow. The owner, a leprechaun, will grant all the wishes Garfield can think of.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie has found a strange, big bone in the garden. After some research, Garfield has found that it might be a dinosaur bone, and that could make him rich... enough for having lasagna forever, at least!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A salesman has sold Jon a cleaning Robot, which is very annoying to his two pets.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Floss Dance
programme.desc: Learn the dance "The Floss" with LEGO Friends and experience the much more fun.

programme.title: Karoake and Music Special
programme.desc: LEGO Friends are having fun with Karaoke and music.

programme.title: Celebrating The Special Day
programme.desc: Here, the girls go on an adventurous balloon ride. Watch how much fun they have.

programme.title: Only One Can Remain
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.” On the island, Lloyd learns his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen. They meet the playfully deceitful ruler who tells them they are in a tournament where ‘Only one can remain'. When they are spoiled by their posh quarters, they are surprised to find the game is already afoot: Last person to find a Jade Blade is out. After an epic battle of elemental powers, Kai steals the last one from Karlof, who is kicked out of the tournament through a trap door leading to the unknown. Later that night, the Ninja go in search for Zane but come across an underground temple where Chen and his Anacondrai Worshippers steal Karlof's power. Is this a fighting tournament, or a ploy to steal everyone's power?

programme.title: Versus
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. In order to find Zane and get to the bottom of Chen's mysterious plot the Ninja need to stay in the tournament and get past the first round. Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. Meanwhile, new Titanium Ninja Zane is locked in a dungeon and has a nightmare about a ferocious Ice Dragon. Guided by the voice of Pixal, he embraces his new technology and escapes his cell, only to find Pixal hasn't fared as well. Though she has no body, he inputs her CPU into his, uniting the two. In an attempt to prevent Jay versus Cole, the Ninja enlist the Master of Mind to help, but are unable to prevent the inevitable. In a gladiator battle, Jay and Cole put aside their feud to throw the match --enraging Chen to send Cole down the mysterious trap door. Lastly, Nya sees Zane's beacon is working again and is on the hunt for them.

programme.title: Winds Of Change
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only to discover it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. After the Ninja save a small fishing village, Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain but Kai promises to watch over him. When Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. When the Ninja's powers mysteriously disappear, they return to the Tea Farm and are attacked by Lloyd, who is possessed by the spirit of Moro, the Master of Wind! After a harrowing escape on the Bounty, Wu tells the Ninja they weren't his first pupils!

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja – and the Ninja discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, leaving them to crash. When the dust settles, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja. They discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. In order to save Lloyd and get their powers back, they set off to find the first clue – the scroll to the lost martial art of ‘Airjitzu'. On their way to get it, they have a run in with one of Moro's ghost generals Wraythe, and discover water is the key to stopping them. Meanwhile, Nya discovers a family secret – her mother was a Water Ninja and with training, she could be one too.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: Open Mike Knight
programme.desc: The Book of Betrayal leads Jestro and his Monsters to Funnyton – the funnies town in the kingdom. When they Knights arrive to capture him, they discover (to their shock) that Jestro and the Book of Monsters are now the town's top comedians! Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody's in town. Then, they hear…laughter?! The entire town is there listening to a stand-up comic JOKES KNIGHTLY. He's hilarious. He commands such power, such attention, and such loyalty. Jestro and the BOM decide they must become funny. They order all kinds of book on comedy from Spamazon: books on parody, irony, insult humor, slapstick, satire, knock-knock jokes, elephant jokes, “my monster is so fat” jokes, etc. They work-up a ventriloquist act with the BOM sitting on Jestro's lap. They start doing their act and, surprisingly, they're funny. They're very funny. The Fortrex arrives and the knights rush out, ready for battle. They fight through a string of monsters just outside the town, but discover they're only working as “bouncers” to keep too many people out of the comedy club. (“Sorry, you guys aren't on the list.”) The knights hear loud laughs and head there. In the club, they discover the town isn't being held hostage, they're in the show voluntarily having a great time. And…Jestro and the BOM are funny. Meanwhile, during the show, Jokes Knightly decides he'll steal the BOM and Jestro's act. During the intermission at the comedy show, Clay comes backstage to talk to Jestro. Maybe, Clay says, this shows that Jestro doesn't have to be bad…he is funny, like Clay always said he was. Meanwhile, Jokes Knightly steals the BOM and Jestro can't find it. He panics. Clay encourages him…go on stage alone, be funny…he can do it! Jestro goes out and is funny on his own he hits all his punchlines, he gets big laughs he starts to see that Clay is right. The BOM sees that Jokes Knightly has a “joke book” that turns out to be the BOOK OF BETRAYAL. That's how Mike Knight has become so funny – by stealing everyone's material! BOM calls in Magmar, who saves him from Mike Knight AND takes the Book of Betrayal. As Jestro comes off-stage to great applause, the BOM tells him they have the Book of Betrayal. The BOM calls in Magmar and his monsters and they start a fight as Clay comes to Jestro's defense and calls on the other Knights for backup. A big battle ensues that destroys the comedy club in Funnyton. The Knights win and drive-off Magmar, the monsters and the BOM. As they retreat, the BOM looks around: “Where's my Jestro?!” Jestro sneaked away during the fight and is in a nearby forest with…the Book of Betrayal.

programme.title: The Fortrex And The Furious
programme.desc: In a massive chase around Knighton, the NEXO-Knights attempt to keep the Book of Betrayal out of the Book of Monster's grip. But the evil book is persistent. Will he get the final piece of his evil puzzle? We finally REVEAL that Jestro has given the Book of Betrayal to…Clay. He tells Clay what it is and how Mike Knight used it. And it seems that the Book of Monsters believed it to be the final ingredient in some ‘Master Plan.” Suddenly, they realize Monsters – led by Magmar and the super-mad Book of Monster – are after them! Clay retreats with Jestro and the Book of Betrayal to rendezvous with the other Knights at the Fortrex. The Fortrex isn't fast enough they'll need their own vehicles. They decide that they need to split up and go in multiple directions to make the monsters expend their resources on a chase. It's a huge chase, being covered like a crazy news event by the Knighton News Network. We see a montage of the monsters stopping and capturing all the Knights vehicles: Aaron, Macy, Lance…finally Axl. However, as they do, they realize that the Knights have used Squirebots in Jestro Fan Jester hats (from the vendor at the comedy club in 108) as decoys. They think Axl has the Book of Betrayal in his BRICK containment unit, but it turns out to be the Ned Knightly Comic from episode 203. The Monsters finally corner Clay, who has the real Jestro and Book of Betrayal in his sword vehicle. Before Clay can protest, Jestro pushes the launch button and fires off Clay in the vehicle's rocket sword. The monsters race off with Jestro, leaving the shocked Clay fearing for his friend. Now, Magmar tells the Book of Monsters, they only need to get BOB. Clay makes his way back to the Fortrex and tells what has happened. They decide they must get to the Redoubt of Ruination in the Lava Lands and try to save Jestro. Meanwhile, we see, INTERCUT, a scene where Merlok 2.0 and the Book of Monsters explain the Books of Evil, how they were created and what the BOM will use them for. Merlok, back in the day, split the evil MONSTRUX into 10 magic books to keep him from ever being a threat. Only, he didn't destroy the books…and now the BOM has them and Monstrux can come back into the world! Meanwhile, the BOM has set up the huge, ceremonial arena at their HQ so they can have the ceremony to bring Monstrux back into the world. Jestro realizes he's been a pawn of the Book of Monsters. Jestro says he'll never get the Book of Betrayal…the Knights have it. In the last scene, we see Clay taking the Book of Betrayal from the Fortrex, climbing into his vehicle and driving towards…the Redoubt of Ruination! Has the Book of Betrayal worked its evil magic on him?!

programme.title: Kingdom Of Heroes
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form. Can the NEXO-Knights and Merlok 2.0 stop the greatest threat they've ever faced? Or will the kingdom be plunged into darkness…forever. The Redoubt of Ruination readies the final ceremony to call forth MONSTRUX, the arch-necromancer of the past. Clay, holding the Book of Betrayal walks to the gates of the spooky place. Inside, Clay hears strange…singing and music. It's like a twisted Broadway show of some kind. Meanwhile, the Knights all realize Clay is gone and so is the Book of Betrayal. Macy says Clay must be up to something. They have to trust him and, more importantly, they have to find him. At the Redoubt of Ruination the ceremony has already begun! The Book of Monsters wants the final ceremony that calls forth Monstrux to be like a really great show! The BOM then barfs up all the BOOKS OF EVIL into their places around Jestro. He's just missing the BOOK OF BETRAYAL, which Clay has. Clay says he'll trade the book for Jestro. The BOM immediately agrees to the deal and sets Jestro free. Then, Monsters grab-up Clay, restrain him, and put him in Jestro's place on the sacrifice stone. From outside, they're interrupted by the sounds of battle the Knights have arrived on the Fortrex and are attacking the Redoubt of Ruination. In the confusion, Jestro slips away. The BOM lets loose with a powerful protection spell to keep the Knights out as he starts with the ceremony…he's going to bring Monstrux out and remanifest him in Clay's body! Jestro is able to escape the Redoubt and make his way to the Knights, who can't seem to battle their way in. It's a race against time as the Knights try to get in and save Clay. As the Knights get in, they see that the crazy BOM is absorbing all the Books of Evil, one-by-one. He grows BIGGER and BIGGER! Macy calls for NEXO-Power…but it's not enough! The gigantic Book of Monsters sucks down the final book, the Book of Betrayal! He looms over Clay, about to consume him, too, and make him into Monstrux! Suddenly, Robin appears carrying TECHKALIBER…he tosses it to Clay. Just as the huge Book of Monsters falls on Clay, he holds up Techkaliber and Merlok 2.0 is there…his full power in the sword. Clay sticks the sword into the Book of Monster's huge mouth. BOOM! There's a BIG, MAGICAL EXPLOSION! As we cut back inside, we see the Book of Monsters is gone. The Knights release Clay and he thanks them and Jestro for saving him. Jestro thanks them all for saving him and seeing the good in him. WE DISSOLVE TO: The JoustDome. In a final ceremony the King and Queen reward the knights and congratulate them for keeping the kingdom safe. There are speeches, happiness and friendship. And Jestro even does a bit that's funny. At the very end we see a hint of something…Monstrux and the Book of Monsters are still out there.

programme.title: Short Sheeped
programme.desc: Logan's desperation to prove himself leads to his capture by the Nightmare King, which leaves his friends to face the Sheep Week finals alone.

programme.title: The Grim Escape
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to save Logan from the Shadowkeep's dungeon, but the liberators soon become the prisoners in a nightmarish twist of fate.

programme.title: Prophecy Of The Green Ninja, Greatest Battles
programme.desc: So the final puzzle forces ninja to question the true meaning of the Green Ninja Prophecy. Solving the puzzles releases a new peril for the Ninja to face. Will memories of their greatest victories be enough to defeat it?

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Floss Dance
programme.desc: Learn the dance "The Floss" with LEGO Friends and experience the much more fun.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sari is kidnapped, and Prowl and Bulkhead investigate the Dinobots, pursued by Fanzone.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A vengeful Sumdac employee controls an Autobot, sending it on a destructive rampage.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Prowl, Bumblebee, and Sari uncover danger in the woods while investigating an energy signal.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The kids help rebel Minicons escape so they can choose their own paths.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hot Shot lets Wheeljack shoot him to make amends, but it's not enough.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Miko and Bulkhead retrieve Energon Harvester in Greece, facing new Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Jack enters a race with Bumblebee to impress a girl Knock Out crashes the event.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Arcee takes Jack on a mission but confronts a feared enemy from her past.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus is infected Arcee and Bumblebee infiltrate warship to retrieve cure.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots are banished from Earth, placed in a spacecraft and set on a crash course for the Sun.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron launches a full-scale assault on the people of Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A Negavator attack causes Red Alert to malfunction.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime is captured by Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Spike and Carlee are stranded on Cybertron.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Snappy's Puppet: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby Smurf Is Missing: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing Out Of Time: None of the Smurfs seem to have time to play with the Smurflings. They go on a visit to Father Time and come across the River of Time, the great current that flows along majestically, carrying with it all the time in the world. And then an accident occurs, with untimely consequences...

programme.title: Tailor's Magic Needle
programme.desc: Tailor Smurf has to make an outfit for every Smurf before the Fall fashion show. Brainy Smurf wants to help him and, using Papa Smurf's book of Magic, he conjures up a magic needle that sews ten times faster than tailor... But is it really any good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Memory Melon: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf For Denisa: Balthazar brings Denisa to Gargamel to baby-sit. But Gargamel loses Denisa in the wood and she and Sassette meet and become friends. Sassette and Denisa work together to free the Smurfs from Gargamel's stewpot, and prove you don't have to be big to be brave.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Peewit's Unscrupulous Adventure: Peewit, the court jester, is the Smurfs' human friend. There is to be a celebration at the King's castle and Peewit good-humouredly invites his little blue friends to the feast. But they learn that the wicked chamberlain is pilfering the King's possessions.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Poltersmurf: There are few things Grandpa Smurf enjoys more than telling a good scary story, and there are few Smurfs who don't love to listen. But things get a little too much for Brainy Smurf when Grandpa tells of Poltersmurfs, and Poltersmurfs begin harrowing Brainy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy And The Porridge Pot: The good fairy, Guinilda gives Greedy a magic porridge pot that Brainy causes to overflow into the village and forest. The good-hearted fairy hurries to the rescue and then asks for the pot back to give to an orphanage of hungry children.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Most Unsmurfy Games: To prove the worth of his Big Book of Wilderness Survival, Brainy takes the Smurflings to the swamp. Where, thanks to his expert advice, the tiny group gets totally lost, is then caught in quicklime and trapped by King Bullrush of the Wartmongers. Fortunately, Bullrush is in a playful mood and devises a Smurf hunt. Unfortunately, Brainy believes he is a born leader...

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Noble Stag: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Curried Smurfs: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Sorcerer Smurf: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. Papa Smurf outwits the wicked wizard with some of his own magic and Gargamel is chased down the mountain and back to his castle.

programme.title: S2 Robo‑Bwahs
programme.desc: Robots rise, circuits spark and Rabbids battle their mechanical doubles.

programme.title: S2 Moonshot Madness
programme.desc: Rocket fails, space dreams and cosmic chaos launch Rabbids sky‑high.

programme.title: S2 Bwah‑BFFs
programme.desc: Friendships form, break and explode in classic Rabbid emotional chaos.

programme.title: S1 Supernatural Bwah‑ventures
programme.desc: Aliens, hypnosis and spooky surprises send Rabbids into weird territory.

programme.title: Blooming Bwahs & Outdoor Antics
programme.desc: Nature blooms and chaos follows as Rabbids meet animals, chase sunshine and leap into fresh spring adventures.

programme.title: S1 Critter Chaos
programme.desc: Animals, fleas and farmyard madness spark wild Rabbid antics.

programme.title: S2 Creature Bwah‑niverse
programme.desc: Feathers, claws and critter chaos as Rabbids meet wild new friends.

programme.title: Around the world in one day
programme.desc: The Bear is preparing to go on a world trip, but a last minute accident makes him panic. In the meantime, Masha knows the best way to prepare for the trip and shares it with the Bear.

programme.title: Princess and the Beast
programme.desc: Shocking and sensation! For the first time in our forest! A couple of tourists broke into the Bear's house without an invitation in search of impressions and cool photos. And there they are - just a sleepy Bear and Masha, who really wants to play. Rejoice tourists! You will have impressions, photos, and obstacle course from here and to the city itself!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie. But this time an honest lot distributed the roles. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Will Rosie endure mother's everyday life?

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: All the world's a stage
programme.desc: The best remedy for boredom is a good game. And a good play is even better. That is exactly what our friends decided. It's just not so easy to agree on what kind of play to stage..

programme.title: The Tops and the Roots
programme.desc: There was a village and a man, living in this village. In a deep forest near that village, the Bear settled in. The Bear asked the man for some tasty treats. The man gave the Bear two options of what he prefers to eat: the tops or the roots. The Bear decided to take the tops. The man grew a turnip and gave the tops to the Bear. The tops were tasteless. The Bear asked the man to try the turnip. The man agreed on the condition that the Bear will help him with the housework and keep off the flies. While chasing away the flies, the Bear accidentally hit the man on the nose. The Bear was scared and ran away into the forest, grabbing the turnip with him. Since then, people use to say “to be a fool for one's pains”.

programme.title: Ali Baba
programme.desc: This story is about one very kind, but very poor Ali-Baba and his rich but greedy brother Kasym. Once upon a time Ali-Baba overheard the magic spell, which opens up the magic cape with numerous treasures. These treasures were stolen by the thieves and kept in this cave. One day Ali-Baba met Kasym and told him the secret spell. Kasym got inside the cape, but accidentally forgot the spell and the thieves caught him. They forced Kasym to learn the whole book of fairy tales by heart and spend one thousand days and a thousand and one nights telling these stories to them. This story teaches us to study well and avoid cheating.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: Tom Thumb
programme.desc: This is a story about the small but brave boy. The moral of the story is that no matter how big and tall you are, you should not offend the little ones. It may happen so that you will meet some tom thumb boy, who will beat any “giant”.

programme.title: Wee Little Havroshechka
programme.desc: There lived a woman who had three daughters - two of her own and the stepdaughter called Wee Little Havroshechka. She loved her own daughters and hated the stepdaughter who was forced to work till dawn. No matter how hard she tried to please the stepmother, she was unapproachable. Once upon a time the stepmother kicked her out of the house, but every medal has its flipside – Wee Little Havroshechka met her Prince and they lived happily ever after, and it's all because she was hard-working and clean.

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Tour de Forest
programme.desc: Himalayan Bear is once again competing with Bear! This time they have arranged a bike race, but something doesn't smell right: Himalayan Bear intends on cheating to win! Good thing Masha stands as a guardian of justice and always comes to a friend's aid!

programme.title: What's Inside?
programme.desc: "What is inside such seemingly simple objects surrounding us? How are the mechanisms that we use every day arranged? Maybe they work with the help of magic? Or maybe each system has a certain order?In this episode, Masha decides to figure out how the objects surrounding her are arranged. And in the company of an old friend, this research becomes an adventure. "

programme.title: Try, Try Again
programme.desc: A van with Monkeys arrived at the Bear's house. They invite everyone to test themselves with the help of an attraction - a power meter. The Bear is confident that he will easily win the main prize. But things didn't go according to plan. And now the main strongman of the forest cannot do without the help of his friends.

programme.title: Princess and the Beast
programme.desc: Shocking and sensation! For the first time in our forest! A couple of tourists broke into the Bear's house without an invitation in search of impressions and cool photos. And there they are - just a sleepy Bear and Masha, who really wants to play. Rejoice tourists! You will have impressions, photos, and obstacle course from here and to the city itself!

programme.title: First Day Of School
programme.desc: With the beginning of September, Masha, like all the children wants to go to school and asks the Bear to make her one. Overwhelmed with enthu-siasm, the Bear completes the task and the next day Masha sits at a brand new desk and tries to act as an attentive student but ends up bringing the Bear to absolute madness.

programme.title: Fishy story
programme.desc: Summer is a time of rest and miracles. How nice is just to sit on the river bank with your best friends! However, everything is not so simple in our story. The Bear didn't even suspect what kind of adventure he was going to find on his fishing trip. While Masha and She-Bear frightened by his sudden disappearance, explore the neighborhood, he ... however, you will find out everything yourself in our new episode.

programme.title: Don't Wake Till Spring!
programme.desc: The autumn has arrived. The Bear prepares for his winter bedtime by barricading himself from Masha inside the house. But the little girl manages to find her way indoors and causes yet another mess by awakening a whole swarm of bees. But all her games eventually stop and when the Bear cooks some porridge to feed the child, he discovers her fallen asleep.

programme.title: A Ghost Story
programme.desc: At first time in her life Masha is frightened in earnest, however this creepy story shook up the whole forest and now hardly anyone can stay away from these strange scenes! And what would you do if your own pillow and blanket turn into real ghosts?! A real ghost story, oh yeah!

programme.title: The Very Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Masha loves fairy tales and of course she believes that each fairy tale should lead to happy end, even if nothing contributes to it! That's how the story goes… The Bear still hopes to win the heart of the female Bear. He finds an ancient gondola at the bottom of the forest lake. The Bear decides to restore it and invites the female Bear for a romantic ride! No one would have expected that this story would perfectly match Masha's new hobby - puppet theatre.

programme.title: Time To Ride My Pony
programme.desc: The Bear's good friend, the Tiger, is back for a visit and they decide to spend the time together in an intellectual way – playing chess. Masha is immediately drawn into the game and to everyone's surprise, she outsmarts and outplays both the Bear and his friend with just one chess figure.

programme.title: The Grand Piano Lesson
programme.desc: The bear finds a beautiful black piano in the forest. He happily takes it home, fixes and tunes it and begins to play some music. Masha couldn't help staying away from this lovely instrument. She decides to become a world famous pianist, she asks the Bear to teach her how to play the piano.

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: The Foundling
programme.desc: Occasionally Masha finds an egg, from which a penguin hatches. The Bear has to take double care now. He cooks special dishes and builds mini aqua park for little penguin and Masha. Finally the Bear figures out that the penguin will be happy only in suitable weather conditions and send the penguin Antarctica on a little plane.

programme.title: See You Later
programme.desc: This day will change Bear's life forever. To everyone's surprise, Masha has suddenly grown up, getting all the forest dwellers shocked by her exceptionally good behavior. Her sister Dasha is going to take her back to the big city, which really upsets the Bear and others.

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: We Come In Peace!
programme.desc: In the courtyard of the Bear's house a spaceship makes an emergency landing. The aliens need to urgently replenish their supplies and return home. Only on the ground everything is arranged differently than at home. Masha and Mishka will help them to understand what's what, fix the ship and go back to home.

programme.title: Scary Story About Spooky Stories
programme.desc: Are you sure that you really like spooky stories? What if this kind of story will get you really thrilled? Listen to one classic story and don't say that you are not shocked after all!

programme.title: Soul Freezing Tale Of Grim Forest And Tiny Timid Bug
programme.desc: All children are afraid of the dark. Masha was afraid of it too and had to sit with a torch all night long! But once upon a time she came up with the tale about a tiny bug, which lived in the woods and was so afraid of the dark, that every rustle made its heart tremble! The bug suffered a lot until he realized that all tiny things you see in the dark just seem to be frightful and fear makes no sense at all!

programme.title: Terrible Truth About Those Who Are Afraid To Be Little
programme.desc: Everyone think that it's so scary to be little as there are so many things are not accessible for you! But in reality there is no difference how little you are if there is someone who cares for you and someone you care about…

programme.title: Gloomy Story About The Darkest Dreams
programme.desc: All children are keen on computer games! Everyone likes to shoot a couple of monsters before going to sleep. Tolik also liked to play shooters until the monsters attack him in reality in order to commit the revenge! Or…was it just a dream? Let's see...

programme.title: Sinister Saga Of A Sick Tummy And A Girl Who Was Afraid Of Doctors
programme.desc: Masha narrates a terrific story about one little girl who was afraid of doctors. And once upon a time she experienced one fantastic story…she decided to cook dinner for her dolls. She took some clay and made “meat balls” with “semolina porridge”. As the meal seemed tasty, Sima decided to eat a bit of her dinner too… And so she lies in her bad and feels a horrible stomachache. Nobody knows how long she would need to suffer, but when she woke up…she realized herself in hospital…near the real snow queen… who explained that medical treatment is not scary at all…though some other things are very fearsome! Oh yeah!

programme.title: Bloodcurdling Saga About Joyful Event
programme.desc: Everyone think that it's so scary to be little as there are so many things are not accessible for you! But in reality there is no difference how little you are if there is someone who cares for you and someone you care about…

programme.title: Grim Parable About Superstitious Girl
programme.desc: Some people happen to believe in all sorts of omens like black cats, wearing clothes inside out, prophetic dreams… Poor girl Lucy believed in that kind of stuff so much that was even afraid to go outside to play with her friends. And how could you go out if you were born in the year of Purple rabbit that promises…no matter what… You'll see…

programme.title: Terrifying True Story About Monsters And Those Who Fear Them
programme.desc: Are you afraid of monsters? Sure you are! Let me tell you a scary story about a boy who experienced a real fear…This story happened on an abandoned tractor factory. The boy lost a scoop from his toy-tractor and decided to look for it at the factory. So he goes up the stairs and sees a large female monster, who was about to paint her lips with a roller! As he kept walking he noticed more monsters playing domino! The boy was very terrified and about to cry, when he learnt that it was just a movie set and all the monsters were not real! They were just actors…Finally the boy realized that all the monsters from the books and movies are not real at all! But if want to see a real monster- watch a fly under a microscope!

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Seven Young Kids
programme.desc: This educative tale teaches us that caution should never be dismissed. Mother-Goat goes to pick up cabbage, leaving her seven kids alone at home. Hungry Wolf tries to get into the house imitating mother Goat's voice to fool the little yeanlings. He manages to deceive six kids, but the seventh, the smallest one, manages to hide in the oven. The Wolf tries to get into the house through the chimney, but here comes Mother-Goat and finds her seventh kid. She melts the stove, and the Wolf rushes into the forest with his tail burnt. The other six kids come back home and finally the family reunites.

programme.title: The Fox and the Rolling Pin
programme.desc: This is the story about the Fox, the Cat and the Rooster. The sneaky Fox wanted to fool the Cat in order to eat the Rooster and get a rolling-pin. No matter how the Fox tried to butter up the Cat, he denied hand over the Rooster to the Fox. To teach her a lesson, the Cat got into a bag himself and when the Fox opened it in order to eat the Rooster, the Cat jumped out of it and frightened her. The point of the story is that “if you are well off you don't seek better”.

programme.title: Go I Know Not Whither
programme.desc: Once upon a time there was a king. He was very cranky and foolish. One day he wished to taste an exotic fowl and sent Yegor the huntsman to the deep forest. In the forest, Yegor met a starling, which turned into a beautiful girl. The Tsar saw Yegor to have successfully completed his task and also got the beautiful wife. He started to envy Yegor. The Tsar decided to send Yegor over distant seas to bring do not know what. Despite Tsar's insidious plan, Yegor has successfully returned back home and even taught the king an important lesson not to envy other people.

programme.title: The Frog Princess
programme.desc: There lived a Tsar with his three sons. The oldest son married on nobleman's daughter, the second one married the merchant's daughter, while the youngest son - on the Frog. She was not pretty, but happened to be the Frog Princess who turned into a beautiful girl. This story teaches us to take care of your pets. This is the only way they could appeal to your concerns and become your faithful friends.

programme.title: Liar, Liar, Pants On Fire
programme.desc: Kids love daydreaming and show off their imaginary successes, aren't they?! Masha and Panda grip into a real cheating competition! This would be very funny story If only all the secrets were not revealed all at the most inopportune time!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff "unworthy".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Professor Von Schlemmer (from Too Tall Tails) has created a machine which brings dreams to life. When Robotnik hears about it, he forces the Professor to alter the machine so that nightmares come to life.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a Brain Evolution Achievement Negatizer, or B.E.A.N., in order to make all of Mobius stupid. But instead of turning Sonic and Tails into dummies, the BEAN device turns them into three year old babies!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma escapes again from the Mobius Home for Really Bizarre People, disowns Robotnik for failing to capture Sonic, then with the help of an obscure Mobius law, adopts Sonic!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When an undersea world is threatened by Captain Memo and his lobster sub, Sonic spreads a rumor that Memo plans to attack Robotnik next.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Garden Gauntlet
programme.desc: The competition grows and the gamers meet their 7th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players get lost in this hectic hedge maze.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Sweet Escape
programme.desc: The competition is down to the final four! Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers run through this sugary sweet obstacle course for the chance to become the ultimate gamer.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Speed
programme.desc: Krusha gets highly intelligent after being run over by a minecart and turns into the leader of the Kremlings. When Diddy and Dixie are trapped in a runaway mine cart with no brakes, it's up to Donkey Kong and Candy to rescue them.

programme.title: SONIC X The Adventures of Knuckles and Hawk
programme.desc: Knuckles rescues a man named Hawk from ancient ruins. Discovering later that Hawk had discovered a chaos emerald, Knuckles seeks for him once again in Oriental City. There he is confronted by some local thugs Li Yan and the Bruiser Boys.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Dune Dash
programme.desc: The top three gamers meet in the desert to race their way into the finale. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players battle the sand, snakes, and scorpions in this cactus race course.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Rainbow Rumble
programme.desc: The top two gamers meet head-to-head in the final challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players race to the finish line to be crowned the ultimate gamer!

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country. Donkey Kong Country
programme.desc: Donkey Kong Country

programme.desc: When Sonic, Tails, Chris and the Egg Fort crash land on the Nature Continent after a fight, Tails and Chris protest against a dam while Sonic is caught in a battle against Decoe, Bocoe, E-65 and Eggman

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Meet the Gamers
programme.desc: Host Frankie view gets to know the Kidaverse Roblox Rumble gamers. Get to know their awesome personalities and strategies for the competition.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble KC Raceway
programme.desc: Join the gamers in their first challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers race to victory and earn their first round of points

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Donkey Kong Country
programme.desc: Donkey Kong Country
